flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The University of Montana rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.4k → $33.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of Montana rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Montana fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
